---
title: "Reading #6"
author: "Steph Krieger"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

Question #2:

Personally I prefer to write my code not nested on a single line because I find it easier to follow. When it is nested on a single line it can feel confusing rather than just a series of steps I have to follow.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

mtcars |> filter(cyl == 4) |> select(mpg, cyl) 

```
